Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: TurboQuant-WASM – Google's vector quantization in the browser 118 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. Scientists observe an immune signaling complex forming inside cells 77 upvotes, 6 comments
  3. Ruckus: Racket for iOS 30 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. Notes from from Butterick's Practical Typography 27 upvotes, 2 comments
  5. The Indie Internet Index – submit your favorite sites 69 upvotes, 11 comments
  6. Show HN: A game where you build a GPU 383 upvotes, 117 comments
  7. Embarrassingly simple self-distillation improves code generation 490 upvotes, 156 comments
  8. Some Unusual Trees 224 upvotes, 67 comments
  9. Plague Ships (2020) 31 upvotes, 5 comments
  10. Training mRNA Language Models Across 25 Species for $165 95 upvotes, 27 comments
  11. IBM 3270 Information Display System: Color and Programmed Symbols (1979) [pdf] 26 upvotes, 5 comments
  12. The Cathedral, the Bazaar, and the Winchester Mystery House 141 upvotes, 52 comments
  13. Apple approves driver that lets Nvidia eGPUs work with Arm Macs 294 upvotes, 135 comments
  14. Components of a Coding Agent 127 upvotes, 53 comments
  15. Why the most valuable things you know are things you cannot say 94 upvotes, 39 comments
  16. Microsoft to force updates to Windows 11 25H2 for PCs with older OS versions 23 upvotes, 6 comments
  17. How many products does Microsoft have named 'Copilot'? 239 upvotes, 121 comments
  18. Sopwith – 1984 Game (2000) 66 upvotes, 29 comments
  19. Author of "Careless People" banned from saying anything negative about Meta 661 upvotes, 436 comments
  20. Claude Code Found a Linux Vulnerability Hidden for 23 Years 335 upvotes, 215 comments
  21. Breaking Enigma with Index of Coincidence on a Commodore 64 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  22. The CMS is dead, long live the CMS 106 upvotes, 64 comments
  23. Tell HN: Anthropic no longer allowing Claude Code subscriptions to use OpenClaw 1008 upvotes, 766 comments
  24. Show HN: sllm – Split a GPU node with other developers, unlimited tokens 91 upvotes, 58 comments
  25. When legal sports betting surges, so do Americans' financial problems 125 upvotes, 91 comments
  26. Show HN: I made open source, zero power PCB hackathon badges 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  27. Iranian missile blitz takes down AWS data centers in Bahrain and Dubai 87 upvotes, 68 comments
  28. Emotion concepts and their function in a large language model 118 upvotes, 104 comments
  29. Electrical Transformer Manufacturing Is Throttling the Electrified Future 48 upvotes, 43 comments
  30. Mbodi AI (YC P25) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 6:30am, 5 April 2026. Source here.
